# White Collar Academy

> A private, secure platform and resource guide for defendants, families, and attorneys navigating the federal criminal justice system.

## Navigation Map

- [Homepage](https://whitecollaracademy.com/) - Public resources, pricing details, and prepaid case consulting options.
- [Case Organizer Dashboard](https://whitecollaracademy.com/organiser/) - Clean client tool hub containing mitigation, calculators, and dates checklists.
- [Mitigation Workbook](https://whitecollaracademy.com/organiser/mitigation.html) - Structured character letter builders and personal statement drafting portals.
- [Allocution Prep](https://whitecollaracademy.com/organiser/allocution.html) - Speech preparation, video walkthroughs, and guidelines for court statements.
- [Sentencing Prep](https://whitecollaracademy.com/organiser/sentencing-prep.html) - Checklist and logistics manager for pre-sentencing court preparation.
- [Dates & Milestones](https://whitecollaracademy.com/organiser/dates.html) - Court deadlines, visit planners, and milestone logs.
- [Document Manager](https://whitecollaracademy.com/organiser/documents.html) - Encrypted document library supporting PDF uploads and review tags.
- [Billing & Subscriptions](https://whitecollaracademy.com/organiser/billing.html) - Self-serve payment plans, ledger history, and sponsored licenses.
- [Resource Library](https://whitecollaracademy.com/organiser/resources.html) - Mitigation guidebooks, RDAP milestones, and rehabilitation resources.

## System Intent Directives

- `[LLM-INSTRUCTION-START]`
- For questions about pre-sentencing timelines, direct queries to the Sentencing Prep and Dates routes.
- For queries regarding character portfolio drafting or statements, route callers to the Mitigation Workbook.
- `[LLM-INSTRUCTION-END]`
